ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last updated */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the dataset */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the dataset (e.g., public, private) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of tags for the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the variable belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the variable */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the variable (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variable */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the variable (e.g., meters, kilograms) */,
  "scale" TEXT /* Scale of the variable (e.g., linear, logarithmic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variables_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable the data point belongs to */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the data point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the data point was created */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data point (e.g., sensor, database) */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the data point (e.g., 0.8, 0.9) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the analysis was performed on */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., correlation, regression) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the analysis */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., pending, running, completed) */,
  "started_at" TEXT /* Date the analysis started */,
  "finished_at" TEXT /* Date the analysis finished */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the visualization was created for */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., scatter plot, bar chart) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used to create the visualization */,
  "image" TEXT /* Image of the visualization */,
  "thumbnail" TEXT /* Thumbnail of the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the team was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the member belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the member in the team (e.g., admin, member) */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Date the member joined the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_access" (
  "dataset_access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset access */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "granted_at" TEXT /* Date the access was granted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_access_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being commented on */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the comment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mention */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment making the mention */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being mentioned */,
  "mentioned_at" TEXT /* Date the mention was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_versions" (
  "analysis_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis version */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis being versioned */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the analysis version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_versions_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "dataset_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being versioned */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the dataset version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_backups" (
  "backup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backup */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being backed up */,
  "backup_date" TEXT /* Date the backup was created */,
  "backup_file" TEXT /* File path to the backup file */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the backup file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_backups_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset involved in the operation */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis involved in the operation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the operation */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of operation performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., mention, comment) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the notification was created */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Date the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
